tools_used: provisioned docket snapshot and filed-document text
helpful: The snapshot exposed the response request and amicus filings.
The statpack supplied paid-petition and relist calibration.
The petition extraction included the lower-court opinion needed to assess vehicle defects.
gaps: CourtListener MCP was throttled and returned no research results.
The corpus query lacked topical similarity filters for SCOTUS petitions.
No brief in opposition was yet available because the response deadline remained pending.
notes: The provisioned record was sufficient for a forecast despite the MCP throttle. The broad corpus lookup was expensive and only weakly relevant; structured cert-stage signals such as response-request status would be more useful.
